summary: 4 guarded actions are staged; top write is "Make contradiction sentinel the first founder/startup signal" and current contradiction trust is 100%.

approvalsRequired: Founder approval before any write action executes.
Each action must carry an explicit rollback plan in the queue artifact.
policy.rollbackExpectation: Every action must remain reversible through git or managed-file rollback notes.

actions.title: Refresh score and intelligence artifacts
actions.description: Recompute and persist the current score, founder brief, calibration report, and action plan.
actions.approvalReason: This rewrites canonical runtime artifacts under ignis/output.
actions.rollbackPlan: Re-run the previous scoring cycle from git history or restore the prior artifact snapshots.

actions.title: Capture a timestamped evidence snapshot
actions.description: Persist a point-in-time evidence/founder snapshot for later comparison.
actions.approvalReason: This creates a new timestamped artifact under ignis/output/evidence-snapshots.
actions.rollbackPlan: Delete the timestamped snapshot file if it was created in error.

actions.title: Stamp the current top contradiction
actions.description: Persist the highest-severity contradiction so founder surfaces and audits can reference the same stamp.
actions.approvalReason: This writes a new contradiction stamp that other surfaces may treat as current truth context.
actions.rollbackPlan: Restore the previous contradiction stamp or remove the generated stamp if it was noise.
actions.notes: No contradictions detected. Internal consistency is high.

actions.title: Create a managed task-board item from the top action
actions.description: Insert a managed Now-bucket task for "Make contradiction sentinel the first founder/startup signal".
actions.approvalReason: This mutates the Studio OS task board and therefore needs explicit approval.
actions.rollbackPlan: Remove the managed [IGNIS EXEC] line from TASK_BOARD.md if the action should not stay in the queue.
